name: X: Like Post
summary: Like one X post after human approval at an in-page review gate.
description: Open one X post URL in a fresh tab, pause for human approval, then click the one-way Like control. Use to register approval of a specific post. Do not use to unlike (this workflow refuses to click Unlike) or to reply/quote (use `x_reply_post` / `x_create_post`).

post_url.description: Full X post URL to like.

steps.name: Open the target post in a fresh tab
Allow the post page to settle

target.selector: main article[data-testid='tweet'], main article[role='article'], main article

steps.name: Wait for the like control to appear

inputs.message: Review the target post. Click Continue only if you want this workflow to like it.
inputs.instructions: This workflow clicks only the one-way Like control. If the post is already liked or you do not want to proceed, stop the workflow instead of waiting for the timeout.

steps.name: Pause for review before liking the post
Allow the like mutation to settle
Verify the post is now liked

inputs.script: const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const button = document.querySelector("button[data-testid='like'], button[data-testid='unlike'], [data-testid='like'], [data-testid='unlike']"); return { url: location.href, like_state: button ? (button.getAttribute('data-testid') || null) : null, like_label: button ? normalize(button.textContent || '') : null };

help.summary: Like one X post after human approval at an in-page review gate.

parameters.post_url: Full X post URL to like.

examples.description: Like one specific post after confirming at the review gate.

returns: { url, like_state, like_label } — after a successful like, like_state is "unlike".
notes: Mutating: requires explicit Continue at the review gate (approval_mode=ask_user, continue_on_timeout=false).
Will not click Unlike. If the post is already liked the assertion still succeeds because the Unlike control is already visible.
Opens a fresh tab so parallel runs don't collide.
